title: Repair stale earnings and pending-action known_bias disclosure
hypothesis: Backtest metadata should distinguish snapshot-backed earnings fields from true missing data, and should explicitly disclose that production pending actions are not historically replayed.
scope: Refresh earnings_event_long known_bias from loaded earnings snapshot coverage.
Correct LLM attribution notes so position_actions/pending_actions are not described as replayed.
Add focused schema test coverage and no-drift evidence.
non_goals: Do not change Strategy C signal logic.
Do not replay pending_actions.json from the current production ledger.
Do not change LLM new_trade replay behavior.
Do not change news replay behavior.
acceptance: known_biases.earnings_event_long_data_quality reports snapshot coverage rather than always-None fields.
